mapper.sql: SELECT p.payment_id, p.contract_id, p.fee_type, p.fee_name, p.period_start, p.period_end, p.amount_due, p.amount_paid, p.pay_deadline, p.pay_time, CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '1' THEN '1' WHEN p.pay_status = '3' THEN '3' WHEN p.pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN '2' ELSE COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') END AS pay_status, p.remind_status, p.remind_time, p.remark, p.park_id, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, c.contract_no, c.customer_name, c.contract_name, c.room_name, c.building_name, c.contract_status, CASE c.contract_status WHEN '0' THEN '待签约' WHEN '1' THEN '履约中' WHEN '2' THEN '已到期' WHEN '3' THEN '已续签' WHEN '4' THEN '已终止' WHEN '5' THEN '审批通过待盖章' WHEN '6' THEN '退租审批中' WHEN '7' THEN '退租待交接' WHEN '8' THEN '房屋验收中' ELSE '未知' END AS contract_status_name, pay_cwr.process_ins_id AS payment_process_ins_id, pay_cwr.process_status AS payment_approval_status, pay_cwr.current_node AS payment_current_node_name, pay_cwr.print_file_url AS payment_file_url, law_cwr.process_ins_id AS overdue_process_ins_id, law_cwr.process_status AS overdue_approval_status, law_cwr.current_node AS overdue_current_node_name, law_cwr.print_file_url AS overdue_file_url, term_cwr.process_ins_id AS termination_process_ins_id, term_cwr.process_status AS termination_approval_status, term_cwr.current_node AS termination_current_node_name, term_cwr.print_file_url AS termination_file_url FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT payment_id, MAX(record_id) AS record_id FROM biz_contract_workflow_record WHERE business_type = 'contract_payment' AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY payment_id ) latest_pay_cwr ON latest_pay_cwr.payment_id = p.payment_id LEFT JOIN biz_contract_workflow_record pay_cwr ON pay_cwr.record_id = latest_pay_cwr.record_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT payment_id, MAX(record_id) AS record_id FROM biz_contract_workflow_record WHERE business_type = 'contract_overdue_legal' AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY payment_id ) latest_law_cwr ON latest_law_cwr.payment_id = p.payment_id LEFT JOIN biz_contract_workflow_record law_cwr ON law_cwr.record_id = latest_law_cwr.record_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT contract_id, MAX(record_id) AS record_id FROM biz_contract_workflow_record WHERE business_type = 'contract_termination' AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY contract_id ) latest_term_cwr ON latest_term_cwr.contract_id = p.contract_id LEFT JOIN biz_contract_workflow_record term_cwr ON term_cwr.record_id = latest_term_cwr.record_id

if.test: payment != null and payment.direction != null and payment.direction != ''
payment != null and payment.feeType != null and payment.feeType != ''
payment != null and payment.payStatus != null and payment.payStatus != ''
payment != null and payment.contractNo != null and payment.contractNo != ''
payment != null and payment.customerName != null and payment.customerName != ''
payment != null and payment.buildingNameQuery != null and payment.buildingNameQuery != ''
payment != null and payment.hideFuture != null and payment.hideFuture
payment != null and payment.settleStatus != null and payment.settleStatus != ''

mapper.select:
AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline < CURDATE()
ORDER BY p.pay_deadline ASC, p.payment_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') = '0' AND p.pay_deadline >= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partial_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.remind_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reminded_count, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_due), 0) AS amount_due, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_paid), 0) AS amount_paid, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_due), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_paid), 0) AS amount_pending FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id
